'''shapasa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pneumonultramicroscopicsilicovolcanoconiosis|pneumonultramicroscopicsilicovolcanoconiosis]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-p-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pneumonultramicroscopicsilicovolcanoconiosis|pneumonultramicroscopicsilicovolcanoconiosis]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| shapasa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæpæsæth|shæpæsæth]] || [[word:shæpæsæj|shæpæsæj]] || [[word:shæpæsæsh|shæpæsæsh]] || [[word:shæpæsæ|shæpæsæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shapapasath|shapapasath]] || [[word:shapapasaj|shapapasaj]] || [[word:shapapasash|shapapasash]] || [[word:shapapasa|shapapasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shapasath|shapasath]] || [[word:shapasaj|shapasaj]] || [[word:shapasash|shapasash]] || [[word:shapasa|shapasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shapafsath|shapafsath]] || [[word:shapafsaj|shapafsaj]] || [[word:shapafsash|shapafsash]] || [[word:shapafsaf|shapafsaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shapasatha|shapasatha]] || [[word:shapasaja|shapasaja]] || [[word:shapasasha|shapasasha]] || [[word:shapasaka|shapasaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shapasath|shapasath]] || [[word:shapasaj|shapasaj]] || [[word:shapasash|shapasash]] || [[word:shapasa|shapasa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shapasathal|shapasathal]] || [[word:shapasajal|shapasajal]] || [[word:shapasashal|shapasashal]] || [[word:shapasakal|shapasakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shapasathatha|shapasathatha]] || [[word:shapasajaja|shapasajaja]] || [[word:shapasashasha|shapasashasha]] || [[word:shapasaka|shapasaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shapasathan|shapasathan]] || [[word:shapasajan|shapasajan]] || [[word:shapasashan|shapasashan]] || [[word:shapasakan|shapasakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shapasathaoro|shapasathaoro]] || [[word:shapasajaoro|shapasajaoro]] || [[word:shapasashaoro|shapasashaoro]] || [[word:shapasakaoro|shapasakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
